name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together margarine, sugar and brown sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add vanilla extract to the creamed mixture and beat until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, mixing on medium speed for 1 minute until smooth.
5. Stir in water and chocolate chips.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets lined with foil or sprayed with Pam.
7. Press down lightly with a fork dipped in cold water to form circles about 2 inches across.
8. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Remove cookies from the oven and let cool on wire racks to room temperature.
10. Allow 2 cookies per serving.
Variation: Chocolate Chip Bars
Instead of dropping dough onto cookie sheets, spread dough evenly in a greased jelly roll pan.
Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned and the bars pull away from the sides of the pan.
Allow 2 bars per serving.
